neighborhoods.name: Puerto Armuelles Centro
neighborhoods.description: Former United Fruit Company port town with a frontier feel, beach access, and very low costs
neighborhoods.character: Former banana port, frontier feel, beach, very affordable
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Puerto Armuelles. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Armuelles

neighborhoods.name: Paso Canoas
neighborhoods.description: Border town with Costa Rica offering cross-border shopping and commerce
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Puerto Armuelles's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Armuelles

neighborhoods.name: Progreso
neighborhoods.description: Small agricultural community inland with very low costs and local services
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Armuelles

neighborhoods.name: Corazon de Jesus Beach
neighborhoods.description: Beach area where small but growing number of expats are building homes with Pacific views
neighborhoods.character: Emerging beach expat, Pacific views, pioneer

housing.predominantType: New construction houses and beach properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Puerto Armuelles
